response.justification: Bogdan is a technically strong senior/staff IC with 15+ years of experience and some adjacent developer-tooling work (MCP code generators, test runners, CI setups, Selenium courses), but the resume shows no explicit people-management experience — no team lead title with direct reports, no mention of 1:1s, performance reviews, hiring, or org change. The role is a Level II people-leadership position requiring 2+ years managing people and 3+ years building developer tools as a primary focus, neither of which is clearly demonstrated. Mobile-platform ecosystem experience is also thin (brief iOS/Apple TV work in 2015–2016).
strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded with staff-level scope
Genuine developer-tooling and testing background (Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, MCP tooling, CI/CD setup, Selenium curriculum)
Strong craftsmanship signal: TDD, trunk-based dev, workshops, public talks, and open-source maintainership
concerns: No demonstrated people-management experience — no direct reports, 1:1s, or performance-management responsibilities listed
Developer-tools-as-primary-focus is intermittent; most recent roles are product/full-stack rather than build systems or test infra at scale
Minimal mobile-platform ecosystem depth, which is a core focus area of the role
